name: Drax Group plc
description: Drax Group plc is a UK-based renewable energy company engaged in renewable power generation, the production of sustainable biomass, and electricity sales to business customers. The company operates a portfolio of flexible, low-carbon power assets, including Drax Power Station in Yorkshire, which is the UK's largest source of renewable electricity. Drax is also a pioneer in bioenergy with carbon capture and storage (BECCS) technology, aiming to become a carbon-negative business by 2030.
